short_summary:
Gregory John Landsman (born December 4, 1976) is an American politician who has been the U.S. representative from Ohio's 1st congressional district since 2023. The district is based in Cincinnati, and includes most of its inner suburbs.
A member of the Democratic Party, Landsman served on the Cincinnati City Council from 2018 to 2022. He was elected to the United States House of Representatives in the 2022 election, defeating 13-term incumbent Steve Chabot. He is described as a centrist Democrat.

prior_positions.position: Member of the Cincinnati City Council
